========================
Theorem With Tactic Body
========================

theorem foo {m n : Nat} : 2 * m + 2 * n = 2 * (n + m) := by
  rewrite Nat.add_comm
  exact (Nat.left_distrib 2 n m).symm

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    binders: (binders
      (implicit_binder
        name: (identifier)
        name: (identifier)
        type: (identifier)))
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (binary_expression
          left: (number)
          right: (identifier))
        right: (binary_expression
          left: (number)
          right: (identifier)))
      right: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (parenthesized
          (binary_expression
            left: (identifier)
            right: (identifier)))))
    body: (by
      (tactic_rewrite
        arg: (projection
          term: (identifier)
          name: (identifier)))
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (projection
          term: (parenthesized
            (application
              name: (application
                name: (application
                  name: (projection
                    term: (identifier)
                    name: (identifier))
                  arguments: (number))
                arguments: (identifier))
              arguments: (identifier)))
          name: (identifier))))))

=================
Tactic Expression
=================

variable {m n : Nat}
#check (by
  rewrite Nat.add_comm
  exact (Nat.left_distrib 2 n m).symm : 2 * m + 2 * n = 2 * (n + m))

---

(module
  (variable
    (implicit_binder
      name: (identifier)
      name: (identifier)
      type: (identifier)))
  (hash_command
    (parenthesized
      (by
        (tactic_rewrite
          arg: (projection
            term: (identifier)
            name: (identifier)))
        (tactic_apply
          tactic: (identifier)
          arg: (projection
            term: (parenthesized
              (application
                name: (application
                  name: (application
                    name: (projection
                      term: (identifier)
                      name: (identifier))
                    arguments: (number))
                  arguments: (identifier))
                arguments: (identifier)))
            name: (identifier))))
      type: (binary_expression
        left: (binary_expression
          left: (binary_expression
            left: (number)
            right: (identifier))
          right: (binary_expression
            left: (number)
            right: (identifier)))
        right: (binary_expression
          left: (number)
          right: (parenthesized
            (binary_expression
              left: (identifier)
              right: (identifier))))))))

====
Simp
====

example : 2 = 2 := by simp

---

(module
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (number)
      (number))
    (by
      (tactic_apply
        (identifier)))))

========================
Simp With Extra Theorems
========================

example : 2 = 2 := by simp [foo, bar]

---

(module
  (example
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (number)
      right: (number))
    body: (by
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (tactic_config
          (identifier)
          (identifier))))))

=====
Intro
=====

example : ∀ x y : Nat, x + y = x + y := by
  intro x y
  rfl

---

(module
  (example
    (quantifier
      (identifier)
      (identifier)
      (identifier)
      (binary_expression
        (binary_expression
          (identifier)
          (identifier))
        (binary_expression
          (identifier)
          (identifier))))
    (by
      (tactic_apply
        (identifier)
        (application
          (identifier)
          (identifier)))
      (tactic_apply
        (identifier)))))

=====
Apply
=====

example : true ↔ true := by apply Iff.intro

---

(module
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (true)
      (true))
    (by
      (tactic_apply
        (identifier)
        (projection
          (identifier)
          (identifier))))))

========================
Some Unknown User Tactic
========================

example : true ↔ true := by
  foo
  bar baz
  baz

---

(module
  (example
    (binary_expression
      (true)
      (true))
    (by
      (tactic_apply
        (identifier))
      (tactic_apply
        (identifier)
        (identifier))
      (tactic_apply
        (identifier)))))

==========
Semicolons
==========

example : (true ↔ true) ↔ (true ↔ true) := by
  apply Iff.intro;
  intro h;
  exact h;
  intro h;
  exact h;

---

(module
  (example
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (parenthesized
        (binary_expression
          left: (true)
          right: (true)))
      right: (parenthesized
        (binary_expression
          left: (true)
          right: (true))))
    body: (by
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (projection
          term: (identifier)
          name: (identifier)))
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (identifier))
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (identifier))
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (identifier))
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (identifier)))))

==============
Synthetic Hole
==============

example {x : Nat} : x = x := by refine Eq.refl ?_

---

(module
  (example
    (binders
      (implicit_binder
        (identifier)
        (identifier)))
    (binary_expression
      (identifier)
      (identifier))
    (by
      (tactic_apply
        (identifier)
        (application
          (projection
            (identifier)
            (identifier))
          (synthetic_hole))))))

================================
Tactic Simp With Config List
================================

theorem tacticConfig : 0 + 0 = 0 := by
  simp [Nat.add_zero]

---

(module
  (definition
    name: (identifier)
    type: (binary_expression
      left: (binary_expression
        left: (number)
        right: (number))
      right: (number))
    body: (by
      (tactic_apply
        tactic: (identifier)
        arg: (tactic_config
          (projection
            term: (identifier)
            name: (identifier)))))))
